conventions.title: Backend = Rust (axum 0.8 · tokio · sqlx 0.8 · utoipa).
Frontend = SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 runes; package manager = Bun.
Native/PWA = Capacitor 8 via static-adapter switch.
Primary DB = PlanetScale/Vitess (MySQL); migrations forward-only.
Auth + billing = Clerk; telemetry = PostHog; deploy = Railway.
Handlers are thin async fns returning Result<Json<T>, AppError>.
One wire envelope {data,code,timestamp,count}; helpers response::ok/ok_list.
Errors via one AppError enum + IntoResponse; never leak internals.
Auth via the RequireAuth extractor; no fallback identity.
Authz via the central access::require seam; never scatter WHERE user_id = ?.
Feature gating via RequirePlan + usage::guard/Pass.
Forward-only migrations; never edit an applied migration in place.
camelCase on the wire, snake_case in code (serde rename_all).
Opaque columns stay opaque; never strict-type passthrough JSON.
Outbound HTTP only through the pooled Http seam; never reqwest::Client::new().

check.message: use the pooled Http seam (st.http), not a bare reqwest client

conventions.title: Background work via the Tasks tracker; not bare tokio::spawn.
Logs via tracing; never print!/eprintln! (clippy denies print_stdout/print_stderr).
Telemetry only through the vendor-neutral ports; never a raw vendor SDK call.
API contract is generated (utoipa → OpenAPI → TS); no central registry to drift.
SSE is byte-exact (event:/data: framing, 15s heartbeat, five headers, no [DONE]).
IDs via ids::generate(); don't inline uuid.

check.message: generate IDs via ids::generate(), not inline uuid::Uuid::new_v4()

conventions.title: Resilient boot: liveness independent of DB; ordered graceful shutdown.
Prefer compile-checked query!/query_as!; commit the .sqlx offline cache.
No N+1: batch-hydrate related fields via one grouped IN (…) query.
Global state = class-based runes singleton per domain in lib/state/<d>.svelte.ts.
$state for source-of-truth, $derived for anything computable.
Reactive collections use SvelteSet/SvelteMap/SvelteDate, never plain Set/Map in $state.
One codebase; native/PWA via the CAPACITOR_BUILD adapter switch.
All backend calls through the typed api<T>() wrapper; never fetch() a backend route.
API types generated from OpenAPI; hand-written types only for client-only shapes.
Content nav = the pane system, not goto() routing.
Cross-singleton communication is a direct method call, not a global DOM event.

check.message: call the other singleton's method directly; don't broadcast a global DOM event

conventions.title: No fetch/mutation/orchestration logic in components — it lives in state/.
IDs via generateId(), never raw crypto.randomUUID().
UI primitives in components/ui/, variants via tailwind-variants, class-merge via cn().
Platform detection through utils.ts/screen.svelte.ts, not ad-hoc userAgent sniffing.

check.message: detect platform via utils.ts / screen.svelte.ts, not ad-hoc navigator.userAgent

conventions.title: Agent-runnable: non-interactive by default; every prompt has a flag path.
Dual output: --json with a stable, documented schema on every data-returning command.
stdout = data, stderr = logs/progress/prompts.
Typed, documented exit codes (0/1/2/3/4).
Built on one internal CLI contract kernel (clap derive); not re-implemented per command.
Project config read through the shared loader from midas.toml; no secrets in argv.
Single static binary (musl/rustls); the binary embeds its standard version.
Snapshot-tested surface (assert_cmd): output, --json schema, exit codes.
Logs via tracing to stderr; no print!/eprintln!; never emit secrets/PII.

check.message: route output through the CLI's Output writer (stdout=data, stderr=logs), not print macros

conventions.title: Noun-first subcommand grouping, kebab-case, complete --help.
Release/branch flow via midas flow: PR → review → merge; dev/main split; hotfix path.
Quality gates green before merge (build/test/lint/typecheck per stack).
Generated artifacts (.sqlx, OpenAPI, TS client) regenerated & committed (CI drift guard).
Destructive prod data ops are handed to a human with exact commands.
One-command bootstrap (midas setup owns install → tunnel → doctor).
Local dev = pscale proxy + dotenv chain; flow owns the .env.local tunnel block.
Branch <type>/<slug> off dev (trunk); main = prod; tags semver vX.Y.Z.
Migrations forward-only, numbered NNN_, one DDL set/file, fix-forward.
Schema→prod only via a reviewed PlanetScale deploy request.
Squash-merge to dev; risk-tiered review.
Husky + lint-staged pre-commit not bypassed (--no-verify).
Never commit .env.local/secrets; never force-push main/dev.

check.message: env files must be gitignored — never committable (secrets)

conventions.title: Native ships via manual fastlane dispatch; static SPA via CAPACITOR_BUILD.
The version-stamped midas managed block is present + current in agent docs.
Scaffolding goes through midas touch, never hand-rolled.
midas check is clean (or ledgered) before a PR.
On conflict between a stale local doc and the pinned standard, the standard wins.
Use the seams the conventions name; don't reach around them.
The semantic reviewer returns structured findings keyed to convention IDs.
